definition: substance information as defined in the IEC 62474 database

definition_ml.en: substance information as defined in the IEC 62474 database

note: IEC 62474:2012, 3.13 defines substance as "a chemical element and its compounds in the natural state or obtained by any manufacturing process, including any additive necessary to preserve its stability and any impurity deriving from the process used, but excluding any solvent which may be separated without affecting the stability of the substance or changing its composition".

note_ml.en: IEC 62474:2012, 3.13 defines substance as "a chemical element and its compounds in the natural state or obtained by any manufacturing process, including any additive necessary to preserve its stability and any impurity deriving from the process used, but excluding any solvent which may be separated without affecting the stability of the substance or changing its composition".
